emergency_definition: active flooding or water visibly pooling
emergency_routing_rules: Transfer caller directly to lead on-call emergency dispatch technician for immediate assistance.
call_transfer_rules: 30-second timeout. Fallback: 'I am paging our backup emergency team right now, and someone will call you back within 10 minutes.'
integration_constraints: No non-emergency job tickets in ServiceTitan for standard maintenance calls made after hours. Log details as customer notes for morning dispatch team.
after_hours_flow_summary: A skeleton crew handles on-call emergencies outside standard business hours.
